title: Engineering Modular Biosensors to Confer Metabolite-Responsive Regulation of Transcription
research_objectives: Develop generalizable approach for engineering novel metabolite-responsive biosensors
Evaluate strategies for converting ligand-binding proteins into transcriptional regulators
Identify design principles for biosensor-regulated promoters
Establish foundation for diverse metabolite biosensor applications

research_scope.focus_area: Synthetic biosensor engineering and metabolic regulation
research_scope.methodology: Modular protein design with library screening and statistical analysis

solution_enabled_by_biosensors: Screen large libraries in individual cells
Enable feedback control of metabolic pathways

current_limitation.insufficiency: Cannot monitor many metabolites of interest

experimental_approach.step2: Pair with library of synthetic promoters

design_insights.promoter_optimization: Activity levels matched to biosensor dynamics
